name: multis
description: A personal chatbot and assistant that runs on your computer
author: hamr0

comments.overrides: Pin patched transitive deps of mammoth (the DOCX->md parser multis supplies as litectx's peerOptional). @xmldom/xmldom <=0.8.12 (XML injection/DoS) and underscore <=1.13.7 (recursion DoS) are reachable via a malicious uploaded DOCX. Both patched versions are within mammoth's declared ranges (^0.8.6, ^1.13.1), so this is a non-breaking security pin, durable against lockfile regen. Drop once mammoth bumps them upstream.
